question: What are the vehicle ids and models which have been driven by more than 2 drivers or been driven by the driver named 'Jeff Gordon'?
sql: SELECT v.Vehicle_ID, v.Model FROM vehicle v JOIN vehicle_driver vd ON v.Vehicle_ID = vd.Vehicle_ID WHERE (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT vd2.Driver_ID) FROM vehicle_driver vd2 WHERE vd2.Vehicle_ID = v.Vehicle_ID) > 2 OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM driver d WHERE d.Driver_ID = vd.Driver_ID AND d.Name = 'Jeff Gordon')

back_translation.intent: 查找具有超过2名驾驶员的车辆及其型号，以及名为Jeff Gordon的驾驶员所驾驶的车辆型号

semantic.reason: filters逻辑错误，原始问题要求车辆满足'被超过2名驾驶员驾驶'或'被Jeff Gordon驾驶'，但SQL描述中将两者作为独立过滤条件同时应用，导致结果集错误。
